nodes.name: Telegram Trigger
nodes.notes: Listens for incoming Telegram messages. Set your Bot Token in credentials.

nodes.name: Extract Message
nodes.notes: Pulls chatId and text out of the Telegram payload

nodes.name: Send Typing Indicator
nodes.notes: Sends a 'processing' message so user knows bot is working

nodes.name: Send to Finance Backend
nodes.notes: Sends user message to FastAPI /chat endpoint

nodes.name: Format Reply
nodes.notes: Formats backend response nicely for Telegram markdown

nodes.name: Send a text message
nodes.notes: Sends the formatted reply back to user with quick-action buttons
